pr.title: Non-record: val_bpb=1.1374, FA2+SWA adaptation of Farnsworth

output.summary: Adapt FarnsworthEngine with FA2 FlashAttention fallback, INT6 quant, MUON WD tuning, SWA, and TTT for artifact-size-aware compression.
techniques: INT6 mixed-precision 11-layer transformer with SmearGate and BigramHash
MUON optimizer with tuned weight decay and SWA warmdown to target ~15.5MB artifacts
TTT sliding-window eval on FA2 FlashAttention weights
